title: Senior Creative Designer (DOS)
description:
We are looking for a Senior Creative Designer to join our Brand Development Dept. This candidate will provide essential support in execution of creative works for our in-house F&B brands (DOS). The ideal candidate will have strong design skills, excellent organisational abilities, and capacity to manage multiple tasks while maintaining high creative standards. This role reports to the Creative Manager and works closely with the (DOS) marketing team on a daily basis.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conceptualise and execute design collaterals for outlet/stalls ensuring full accountability from initial concept to final execution.
  • Present design proposals to Brand Leads and other stakeholders while providing clear rationale and justification behind the design decisions that meet marketing objectives and messaging.
  • Work with Visual Merchandising team to ensure productions and artwork for VM display are operationally viable in stores.
  • Demonstrate quality control on brand guidelines to ensure brand consistency and compliance throughout all touchpoints.
  • Good-to-have: The ability to work with a wide range of media, including digital and minor video editing and animation work.

Requirements

  • Proven experience in a design role, with a strong portfolio.
  • The ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines simultaneously.
  • Strong understanding of brand guidelines and the ability to maintain consistency across all creative outputs.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills, with good team-work ethics. Highly objective-oriented and pro-active.
  • Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite and other design tools.

postedCompany.description:
Founded in 2000, BreadTalk Group Pte Ltd has rapidly expanded from Singapore to become a distinctive household brand. The Group has established its mark on the world stage with its bakery, restaurant, and food atrium footprints.

Today, with over 630 outlets in 14 international markets, BreadTalk Group produces culinary magic for everyday recipes that you savour, uniting people with good taste around the world.

With a global staff strength of more than 5,200, the Group operates nearly 550 bakeries, 32 Din Tai Fung restaurants in Singapore, Thailand and the United Kingdom and 38 award-winning Food Republic outlets, as well as 10 Food Junction outlets.
postedCompany.name: BREADTALK GROUP PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
